title: Vietnamese Summer Noodle Salad
description: A refreshing salad made with sweet and crunchy asparagus, tossed in a zesty Vietnamese-inspired dressing.
instructions: Cook the summer noodles according to package instructions and set aside.
In a large bowl, combine the cooked noodles, asparagus, red bell pepper, and carrot.
In a small bowl, whisk together the sweet chili sauce, lime juice, fish sauce, and honey.
Pour the dressing over the noodle mixture and toss to combine.
Sprinkle chopped cilantro on top and serve immediately.
Refrigerate for at least 30 minutes to allow the flavors to meld.
